description: Pass 1 profile polish: add streak progress bar wired to getNextStreakMilestone(), fix STREAK_MILESTONES to full 9-deck array [1,3,7,14,30,60,100,180,365], localize lock badge to TH, fix TH 'Next' badge letter-spacing/uppercase, add Sarabun font to both profile pages, wire 3 phase stylesheets to th/profile.html.
